name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state[turn] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state[turn] # "idle"
          /\ state' = state
          /\ turn' = turn + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants
VARIABLES coordinatorState, messages, participantStates

          /\ participantStates \in [participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ messages \subseteq participants \X participants \X {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

Init == /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
        /\ participantStates = [p \in participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ messages = {}

PreparePhase == /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
                /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepare"
                /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Coordinator", p, "Prepare") : p \in participants}
                /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

CommitPhase == /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
                /\ \A p \in participants : participantStates[p] = "Prepared"
                /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
                /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Coordinator", p, "Commit") : p \in participants}
                /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

AbortPhase == /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
                /\ \E p \in participants : participantStates[p] = "Aborted"
                /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
                /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Coordinator", p, "Abort") : p \in participants}
                /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in participants : participantStates[p] = "Init"
                     /\ \E p \in participants : (("Coordinator", p, "Prepare") \in messages)
                     /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
                     /\ messages' = messages \ {("Coordinator", p, "Prepare")}
                     /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in participants : participantStates[p] = "Init"
                    /\ \E p \in participants : (("Coordinator", p, "Prepare") \in messages)
                    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \ {("Coordinator", p, "Prepare")}
                    /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantCommit == /\ coordinatorState = "Commit"
                     /\ \E p \in participants : (("Coordinator", p, "Commit") \in messages)
                     /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
                     /\ messages' = messages \ {("Coordinator", p, "Commit")}
                     /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantAbort == /\ coordinatorState = "Abort"
                    /\ \E p \in participants : (("Coordinator", p, "Abort") \in messages)
                    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \ {("Coordinator", p, "Abort")}
                    /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

Next == PreparePhase \/ CommitPhase \/ AbortPhase \/ ParticipantVoteYes \/ ParticipantVoteNo \/ ParticipantCommit \/ ParticipantAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

vars == <<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forkOwner, philosopherState


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Each philosopher is identified by an integer 0 .. N-1
Philosophers == 0 .. N-1

\* Each fork is identified by an integer 0 .. N-1
Forks == 0 .. N-1

\* Helper functions to get left and right fork indices
LeftFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> p]
RightFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> (p + 1) \mod N]

\* State of each philosopher
\* 0: thinking, 1: hungry, 2: eating
philosopherState == [p \in Philosophers |-> 0]

\* Ownership of each fork: either FALSE (unowned) or philosopher index
forkOwner == [f \in Forks |-> FALSE]

\* Helper function to check if a philosopher can eat
CanEat(p) == philosopherState[p] = 1 /\ forkOwner[LeftFork[p]] = FALSE /\ forkOwner[RightFork[p]] = FALSE

\* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = 1] /\ UNCHANGED forkOwner

\* Action: philosopher p starts eating (p must be hungry and forks must be free)
StartEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = 2] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = p, ![RightFork[p]] = p] /\ UNCHANGED <<philosopherState, forkOwner>>

\* Action: philosopher p stops eating (p must be eating)
StopEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = 0] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = FALSE, ![RightFork[p]] = FALSE] /\ UNCHANGED <<philosopherState, forkOwner>>

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, start eating, or stop eating
Next == \E p \in Philosophers:
          (BecomeHungry(p) \/ StartEating(p) \/ StopEating(p))

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, all forks are free
Init == philosopherState = [p \in Philosophers |-> 0] /\ forkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> FALSE]

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>>

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosopherState \in [Philosophers -> States]
          /\ forkOwner \in [Forks -> BOOLEAN \/ Philosophers]

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
Safety == \A p \in Philosophers: philosopherState[p] # 2 \/ philosopherState[(p + 1) \mod N] # 2

\* Liveness property: if a philosopher is hungry, eventually he will start eating
Liveness == \A p \in Philosophers: [](philosopherState[p] = 1 => <> philosopherState[p] = 2)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ num[i] = 0
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
             /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Produce item (set to 1)
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Consume item (set to 0)
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == 
    \/ /\ state[i] = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = state
    \/ /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
       /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
       /\ state' = state
    \/ /\ state[i] = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE 
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE 
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE 
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE 
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ readers = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in [1..N -> 1..N]  \* message destination

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![token] = token]  \* message delivered

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  /\ ch = CHOOSE ch \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ IF ch = "Put" THEN
        /\ k = CHOOSE k \in Keys
        /\ v = CHOOSE v \in Values
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

        /\ k = CHOOSE k \in Keys
        /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, chosenBallot, chosenValue, promisedBallot

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = <<>> 

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = b
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [promisedBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN proposers[i] ELSE proposers[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot' = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue' = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> b, chosenValue -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN proposers[i] ELSE proposers[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, v)

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E v \in V : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in Seq(V)

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT
VARIABLES chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state


\* Helper definitions
ChunkIndices == 1 .. CHUNK_COUNT
ChunkSize(i) == CHUNK_SIZE * (i - 1) + 1 .. CHUNK_SIZE * i
Chunk(i) == SubSeq(Seq(1 .. FILE_SIZE), ChunkSize(i))

\* Initial state: idle, no chunks sent
Init == /\ state = "idle"
        /\ chunkIndex = 1
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = {}

\* Action: start sending the file
StartSending == /\ state = "idle"
                /\ state' = "sending"
                /\ chunkIndex' = 1
                /\ retransmitCount' = 0
                /\ sentChunks' = {}

\* Action: send the current chunk
SendChunk == /\ state = "sending"
             /\ state' = "waiting"
             /\ retransmitCount' = 0
             /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

\* Action: receive ACK for current chunk
ReceiveAck == /\ state = "waiting"
              /\ state' = "sending"
              /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunkIndex}
              /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
              /\ retransmitCount' = 0

\* Action: timeout, retransmit current chunk
Timeout == /\ state = "waiting"
           /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
           /\ state' = "sending"
           /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

\* Action: give up after MAX_RETRIES
GiveUp == /\ state = "waiting"
           /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
           /\ state' = "failed"

\* Action: finish sending all chunks
Finish == /\ state = "sending"
          /\ chunkIndex = CHUNK_COUNT + 1
          /\ state' = "done"

\* Next-state relation
Next == \/ StartSending
        \/ SendChunk
        \/ ReceiveAck
        \/ Timeout
        \/ GiveUp
        \/ Finish
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
           /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
           /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

\* Invariant: all chunks sent upon completion
TypeOK == /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting", "done", "failed"}
           /\ chunkIndex \in 1 .. CHUNK_COUNT + 1
           /\ retransmitCount \in 0 .. MAX_RETRIES
           /\ sentChunks \subseteq ChunkIndices

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

\* Properties
FileSent == /\ state = "done"
            /\ sentChunks = ChunkIndices

FileFailed == state = "failed"

\* TLC configuration
\* SPECIFICATION Spec
\* INVARIANT TypeOK

====
